topics.name: cmd_vel_teleop
topics.description: Teleop velocity command. Takes priority over cmd_vel_automated whenever a fresh teleop message has arrived within teleop_timeout_s.

topics.name: cmd_vel_automated
topics.description: Autonomy or scripted velocity command. Used only when no recent teleop message is present.

topics.name: front_left_motor
topics.description: Front-left wheel command, normalized to [-1, 1]. Speed is applied downstream by the motor controller (scaled by the joint's max_velocity).

topics.name: back_left_motor
topics.description: Back-left wheel command, normalized to [-1, 1]. Mirrors front_left_motor on a standard 4-wheel diff-drive base.

topics.name: front_right_motor
topics.description: Front-right wheel command, normalized to [-1, 1]. Speed is applied downstream by the motor controller (scaled by the joint's max_velocity).

topics.name: back_right_motor
topics.description: Back-right wheel command, normalized to [-1, 1]. Mirrors front_right_motor on a standard 4-wheel diff-drive base.

teleop_timeout_s.label: Teleop Timeout
teleop_timeout_s.description: Seconds without a teleop message before falling back to automated commands.
